text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Everything that happens from now on is real.
That's why I have to make sure to witness it with
my own eyes.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'll create striking memories for myself—for
everyone! And I'll make each and every moment
shine brilliantly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion doesn't finish her sentence, but it's
enough. I understand exactly what she's feeling.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day it was decided she would run in the
Twinkle Series, Fine Motion's eyes sparkled
brightly, and her excitement for the future
swelled.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she heads towards her glorious finale, she
looks more beautiful than I can ever remember
seeing her.
choice_data_list: Go out there and have fun!
Go out there and have fun!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, it's really Fine Motion! I would've thought
she'd choose the Arima or something like that!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I wonder how the race is gonna turn out. I'm
starting to get excited here!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Now, hold on just a minute! Fine's not the only
big star here!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Fine! I heard you're going back home soon.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Yes, that's right. That's why, I—

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Then, there's no doubt about it! Today's the day I
mercilessly pound you into a fine dust!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It's only proper for a princess to clash with her
rival head-on and give it all she's got!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Right, please come at me with full force.
However...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Know that I'm going to send you flying and take
victory for myself! ♪
